question: Which US Secretary of State was the namesake for the post-World War II initiative to provide economic aid to rebuild Western Europe?
questionStyled: Which US Secretary of State was the namesake for the post-World War II initiative to provide economic aid to rebuild Western Europe?
explanation: The Marshall Plan, officially the European Recovery Program, was named after George C. Marshall who proposed it in 1947.
explanationStyled: The Marshall Plan, officially the European Recovery Program, was named after George C. Marshall who proposed it in 1947.
